summary: Multi-language support and language purity testing completed. Backend API: 150/150 tests passed. All 12 topics tested across 6 game types in EN/VI/TR modes. Language purity verified - no cross-language character leaks detected.
critical_code_review_comments: Multi-language system correctly implemented with strict language purity
EN mode returns only English content - no TR/VI characters detected
TR mode returns Turkish content without Vietnamese characters
VI mode returns Vietnamese content without Turkish characters
X-System-Language header correctly overrides lang query parameter
Invalid language codes correctly fall back to English
All 12 topics (family, food, animals, colors, numbers, school, weather, travel, health, jobs, home, ielts_academic) support all 3 languages
All 6 game types (matching_pairs, spelling_bee, true_false, word_race, lucky_wheel, fishing) support multi-language
Submit endpoint returns localized success messages in all 3 languages
seed_data_creation: None - Game Bank uses static vocabulary data with 12 topics x 8 words = 96 vocabulary items in 3 languages
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-language purity testing complete. All Game Bank APIs support EN/VI/TR with strict language purity. Test file: /app/tests/test_multilang_purity.py covers 150 test cases including: language purity checks for all game types, header language support, fallback behavior, and localized content verification.

game_list_multilang.details: Returns localized game titles and topic names in all 3 languages

matching_pairs_multilang.details: All 12 topics tested in all 3 languages with purity checks

spelling_bee_multilang.details: All 12 topics tested in all 3 languages with purity checks

word_race_multilang.details: All 12 topics tested in EN and TR modes

fishing_multilang.details: All 12 topics tested in EN and TR modes

submit_multilang.details: Returns localized success messages (e.g., 'Mükemmel! Harika iş!' for TR)

header_language_support.details: X-System-Language header correctly overrides lang query parameter

language_purity_en.details: EN mode contains no Turkish (ğüşıöç) or Vietnamese (ăâêôơưđ) characters

language_purity_tr.details: TR mode contains no Vietnamese characters

language_purity_vi.details: VI mode contains no Turkish characters

fallback_behavior.details: Invalid/empty language codes fall back to English
